content.query:
--drop EXTERNAL table dim_users

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.dim_users
(
    current_age INT,
    retirement_age INT,
    birth_year INT,
    birth_month INT,
    gender VARCHAR(20),
    address VARCHAR(500),
    latitude FLOAT,
    longitude FLOAT,
    per_capita_income FLOAT,
    yearly_income FLOAT,
    total_debt FLOAT,
    credit_score INT,
    num_credit_cards INT,
    load_date DATE,
    load_timestamp DATETIME2,
    source_folder VARCHAR(255),
    client_id VARCHAR(100)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'dim_users',
    DATA_SOURCE = MyDataLake,
    FILE_FORMAT = DeltaFormat
);


select * from dim_users
